rewritten_requirements: The system shall allow small and medium scale sellers to list their products.
The system shall enable sellers to showcase their products.
The system shall allow sellers to advertise their products.
The system shall display a list of all products available from various sellers for customers to view.
The system shall enable customers to purchase products online.
The system shall allow customers to rate or give reviews for products.
The system shall enable customers to report sellers for any violations in delivery or non-compliance with product specifications.
The system shall display the contact information and rating of sellers to customers before purchase.
The system shall facilitate easy authentication and sign-up for new sellers.
The system shall provide separate logins for sellers and customers.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Small and medium scale sellers can list their products in the application.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: E-Retail is an online marketplace application case study where small and medium scale sellers can list, showcase, advertise and sell their products directly to the customers without any physical store.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Sellers can showcase their products in the application.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: E-Retail is an online marketplace application case study where small and medium scale sellers can list, showcase, advertise and sell their products directly to the customers without any physical store.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Sellers can advertise their products in the application.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: E-Retail is an online marketplace application case study where small and medium scale sellers can list, showcase, advertise and sell their products directly to the customers without any physical store.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Customers can view all the products available from various sellers in the application.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Customers can view all the products available from various sellers and buy those products.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Customers can purchase products online through the application.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: It also facilitates online payments for purchasing the products.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Customers can rate or give a review for the product in the application.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Customers can rate or give a review for the product and seller.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Customers can report a seller for any violations in delivery or if the product does not meet the specified requirement in the application.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Customers can also report a seller for any violations in delivery or if the product does not meet the specified requirement.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Customers can view the contact information and rating of the seller before buying the product in the application.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Customers can also view the contact information and the rating of the seller before buying the product (Figures 9.1–9.9).

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Sellers can easily authenticate and signup to the portal.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: New sellers can easily authenticate and signup to the portal and sell their products in the portal.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The application offers separate login for sellers and customers.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The application offers separate login for sellers and customers, where the sellers and customers can sign in and start using the application.
